description: Per-user Gaston preferences: personalization instructions and manual memory notes injected into every prompt. The payload is encrypted client-side (AES-GCM); the PDS and server only ever see ciphertext. Singleton record (rkey 'self').

enc.description: Base64 AES-GCM ciphertext of the JSON { personalization, memory } payload.

salt.description: Base64 PBKDF2 salt used to derive the AES key from the user's passphrase. Not secret.

iv.description: Base64 AES-GCM initialization vector. Not secret.
